probableSamplePolicy.purpose: 允许基于可信招聘平台的公开索引信息和既有数据经验，将高概率真实岗位放入发现池展示。

analysisRules.formalMarketDemand: authenticity.status=verified and all hard gates pass
analysisRules.salaryStatistics: formal sample plus exact monthly salary visible on the direct detail page
analysisRules.skillAnalysis: formal sample plus requirement text of at least 80 Chinese characters
analysisRules.companyExpansion: formal sample plus named end employer; anonymous clients and staffing-only identities excluded
analysisRules.crossPlatformDuplicate: same normalized employer + normalized title + district + overlapping salary range within 14 days is one hiring signal
analysisRules.searchSnippet: may enter the probable discovery pool when all probable signals pass; never counted as detail evidence or used for skill analysis
